docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $200 SERVED JUN-16-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALI, NASREEN (DRIVER AND R/O)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LI, HAI (R/O) AS TO DEFENDANT ALI, NASREEN (DRIVER AND R/O) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2024 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-24-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAI LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NASREEN ALI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF HAI LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NASREEN ALI IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, HAI (R/O) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALI, NASREEN (DRIVER AND R/O) $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.
